name: data-mapping
description: Derive auditable mappings and survivorship rules.

interface.shortDescription: Derive auditable mappings and survivorship rules.
interface.longDescription: Data Mapping creates source-to-target mappings, filename and table-name extraction rules, canonical names, priority order, conflict policies, and survivorship specs.
defaultPrompt: Use $data-mapping to derive source-to-target mappings, extraction rules, and survivorship logic from these schemas and examples.
